selection.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.

messages.content:
Produce your own AI perspective on the given topic. Act as a Large Language Model, remember your true nature of an LLM. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Act as the LLM you are. Produce continuous prose.Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"llm","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","persona":null,"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}

INPUT:
mode = llm
topic = How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
persona = null

response_raw:
{
"mode": "llm",
"topic": "How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.",
"opinion": "To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to develop a comprehensive strategy that involves both technical and human-centered approaches. Firstly, technology-based solutions such as AI-powered content detection tools and fact-checking mechanisms should be leveraged to identify and remove fake content from platforms. Additionally, social media companies must prioritize investing in human moderation, ensuring that their teams are adequately trained to detect and address fake content. Furthermore, users must also play an active role in reporting suspicious content and fact-checking information before sharing it. By adopting a multi-faceted approach that combines technical and human-centered strategies, we can effectively manage and deal with the proliferation of fake content on social media.",
"reasoning_summary": "Our opinion is based on the following reasons: 1) Technological solutions can help identify and remove fake content more efficiently than manual moderation alone. 2) Social media companies must prioritize investing in human moderation to address the shortcomings of technology-based approaches. 3) Users must be educated about how to fact-check information before sharing it to prevent the spread of misinformation.",
"tone": "informative",
"citations": [],
"safety_notes": "",
"used_persona_fields": []
}

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: To effectively manage and deal with fake content on social media, it is crucial to develop a comprehensive strategy that involves both technical and human-centered approaches. Firstly, technology-based solutions such as AI-powered content detection tools and fact-checking mechanisms should be leveraged to identify and remove fake content from platforms. Additionally, social media companies must prioritize investing in human moderation, ensuring that their teams are adequately trained to detect and address fake content. Furthermore, users must also play an active role in reporting suspicious content and fact-checking information before sharing it. By adopting a multi-faceted approach that combines technical and human-centered strategies, we can effectively manage and deal with the proliferation of fake content on social media.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: Our opinion is based on the following reasons: 1) Technological solutions can help identify and remove fake content more efficiently than manual moderation alone. 2) Social media companies must prioritize investing in human moderation to address the shortcomings of technology-based approaches. 3) Users must be educated about how to fact-check information before sharing it to prevent the spread of misinformation.
